title: Ceropegia thuretii
taxonomy: Ceropegia thuretii is classified within the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family, and is a member of the genus Ceropegia. This genus is a part of the order Gentianales. The order Gentianales is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, which also includes the families Apocynaceae, Asclepiadaceae, Loganiaceae, and Gentianaceae. The exact classification may be subject to ongoing research and revisions in plant taxonomy.
